meta.title: Binbang – Frequently Asked Questions
meta.description: Find answers to frequently asked questions about Binbang vacancy alert service.
meta.ogDescription: Binbang FAQ – service, alerts, and beta operations.

title.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
title.subline: Everything you need to know about Binbang.

service.a1: Binbang automatically monitors accommodation booking sites for vacancies and sends email and KakaoTalk alerts when a room becomes available.
service.a2: We currently support Agoda. We plan to add more platforms in the future.

monitoring.a1: The current beta operating standard determines the default check cadence. You can review your current limits and check interval on the usage page, and they may change as operations stabilize.
monitoring.a2: Email alerts are included by default. You can also receive real-time KakaoTalk alerts by connecting your Kakao account.
monitoring.a3: Yes, Binbang monitors around the clock, 365 days a year. Our heartbeat system ensures stable operation at all times.

account.a1: You can sign up easily with your Google account. Your email is used only for account identification and sending alerts.
account.a2: Not yet. Public pricing and automatic billing are not active. The product is currently managed around beta access and usage scope.
account.q3: What if I need a higher limit?
account.a3: Contact us through the beta guide page or support email. We review expansion requests based on real usage context.

other.a1: Binbang collects only minimal information through Google OAuth. Your email is used solely for account identification and sending alerts. Please see our Privacy Policy for details.
other.a2: Please contact us through the support email and we'll get back to you promptly.
